BATHROOM COLLECTION

Luxury Redefined
For Every Space

Explore Products
THE MORZZE STORY

Beyond Excellence, Beyond Ordinary

Born in New Delhi, Morzze brings together European design sensibility with Indian craftsmanship. Every product in our collection — from precision- engineered steel sinks to innovative air taps — is crafted to transform your kitchen and bathroom into spaces of unparalleled luxury.

THE ART OF MAKING

Crafted with Obsession

Every Morzze product passes through the hands of master craftsmen who treat precision as an art form. From raw material to finished product, our commitment to excellence is unwavering.

01

Material Selection

Only 304-grade stainless steel and premium brass alloys make the cut.

02

Precision Engineering

CNC-machined to 0.01mm tolerance for flawless fit and finish.

03

Hand Finishing

Each piece is hand-polished through 7 stages for mirror-perfect surfaces.

FREE SHIPPING

On orders above ₹5,000

12-MONTH WARRANTY

Guaranteed quality

PREMIUM QUALITY

European standards

EASY RETURNS

Hassle-free process

Where Water Meets
Artistry

Every fixture tells a story of precision, passion, and uncompromising quality.

Explore Products
Precision Engineering

Vertex Pro Faucet

Experience the perfect water flow with our flagship kitchen faucet, featuring 360-degree swivel and precision temperature control.

₹64,999₹67,999
INNOVATION

The Future of Touchless Living

Experience the revolution of touchless water control. Our Air Tap technology combines infrared sensing with precision flow engineering, delivering a hygienic, water-saving, and effortlessly elegant kitchen experience.

90% Germ Reduction
40% Water Savings
Sensor-Activated Flow
Natural Elegance

Onyx Granite Basin

Experience the perfect water flow with our flagship kitchen faucet, featuring 360-degree swivel and precision temperature control.

PRODUCT VARIENTS

CLIENT STORIES

Words of Trust

"Switched to Morzze towel warmers and it's the small luxury that makes every winter morning better. Build quality is outstanding."

Sneha Kapoor

Chandigarh • Curved Rail Warmer

Featured
Innovation

The Air Tap is a sleek and innovative hand dryer designed for modern, eco-conscious spaces. Its advanced filtration system ensures clean air while drying, promoting hygiene and reducing the spread of germs. With easy touch operation and intelligent heating, this dryer offers a user-friendly experience, providing efficient and fast drying without compromising on comfort. The eco-friendly design, combined with its space-saving structure, makes it a perfect addition to any restroom, saving both energy and space.

100+

Product Range

35+

Years of Legacy

300+

Projects Done
